description: Constitutional declaration of a Flow, loaded from .intent/flows/*.yaml (src/body/flows/registry.py). Existence in .intent/flows/ is constitutional standing — a flow that exists in code but not in .intent/ is ungoverned. FlowDefinition follows the same registry pattern as ActionDefinition. source_path is a Python Path object (runtime-only, not JSON-serializable); included in properties to suppress AST gate false positives. steps is a list of FlowStep governed by the FlowStep contract. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.

flow_id.description: Registered flow identifier. Primary key in FlowRegistry. e.g. 'flow.fix_code'.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this flow accomplishes.

steps.description: Ordered list of FlowStep declarations. Each step references an AtomicAction or another Flow. Governed by FlowStep contract.

policies.description: Constitutional policy IDs this flow enforces or depends on.

source_path.description: Path to the .intent/flows/*.yaml source file (Path | None). Runtime-only field; not JSON-serializable. Included in properties to suppress AST gate false positives.
